description.en: Ascorbites are secretive, chitinous aliens from Severus whose collective Songs, rigid early indoctrination, and bodily metamorphoses make them deeply unlike humans. They live in tightly bonded collectives that share information through subvocal communication, remain intensely loyal to patrons and nestmates, and are often perceived as unnerving or inscrutable by outsiders. Their species history in the Known Worlds is shaped by Decados manipulation, Avestite fanatic use, and the tension between collective belonging and personal alienation.
description.es: Las ascorbitas son alienígenas quitinosas y reservadas de Severus cuya Canción colectiva, adoctrinamiento juvenil rígido y metamorfosis corporal las vuelven profundamente distintas de los humanos. Viven en colectivos muy cohesionados que comparten información mediante comunicación subvocal, permanecen intensamente leales a patronos y compañeras de nido, y suelen ser vistas como inquietantes o inescrutables por los extraños. La historia de la especie en los Mundos Conocidos está marcada por la manipulación Decados, el uso fanático por parte de los avestitas y la tensión entre pertenencia colectiva y alienación individual.

names.male: Zrix, Skarn, Vexil, Krizz, Drax, Zorx, Vesk, Krix, Zask, Drizz, Skarx, Vroth, Zek, Krass, Vrax, Zirk, Skel, Drez, Vexar, Kzorn, Zrask, Skrix, Varnx, Daxil, Kriz, Zexor, Vroks, Skarnix, Zrith, Drek, Krax, Zraven, Vexok, Skor, Drazk, Krivex, Zornik, Vask, Zrex, Drask, Skrixen, Vorn, Zrak, Krez, Vexin, Dorsh, Zrik, Skarnok, Vrex, Kzarek, Zeskar, Drivok, Skarnel, Vraxx, Zrion, Kresk, Daxor, Vexir, Skrez, Zornax, Krixor, Vasken, Drazor, Zrexil, Skorik, Varnok, Krask, Zrixen, Drok, Vexas, Zraskil, Skarnex, Vrox, Drezor, Krizok, Zexin, Varnex, Skrax, Zravenok, Daxen, Kresil, Zrikor, Vexarn, Skorax, Drezik, Zraskor, Krixen, Vornex, Zexar, Skarnixor, Draxil, Kraskor, Zriven, Vexor, Skarnelix, Zorak, Vaskor, Drezok, Krixar, Zrasken, Skoril, Varnor, Zexil, Draxor, Kriven, Zraskin, Skarnokil, Vexel, Zorik, Draskor, Kresor, Zravenil, Vexarnok, Skrixor, Drezil, Zexorn, Varnix, Krixel, Zraskoril
names.female: Zyra, Skira, Vexa, Krissa, Draxa, Zora, Veskra, Krixa, Zassa, Drissa, Skara, Vroxa, Zeka, Krassa, Vraxa, Zira, Skela, Dreza, Vexara, Kzora, Zrassa, Skrixa, Varna, Daxira, Kriza, Zexara, Vroksa, Skarnia, Zritha, Dreka, Kraxa, Zrava, Vexoka, Skora, Drazka, Krivara, Zorna, Vaska, Zrexa, Draska, Skrixael, Vorna, Zraka, Kreza, Vexina, Dorsa, Zrika, Skarnoka, Vrexa, Kzara, Zeska, Drivara, Skarnela, Vraxxa, Zriona, Kresa, Daxara, Vexira, Skreza, Zornaa, Krixara, Vaskena, Drazara, Zrexila, Skoria, Varnael, Kraska, Zrixael, Droka, Vexasa, Zrassila, Skarnexa, Vroxael, Drezara, Krizoka, Zexina, Varnaexa, Skraxa, Zravaxa, Daxena, Kresila, Zrikael, Vexarna, Skoraxa, Drezika, Zrassora, Krixena, Vornaexa, Zexarael, Skarnixa, Draxila, Krassora, Zrivena, Vexora, Skarnelixa, Zoraka, Vaskora, Drezoka, Krixarael, Zrassena, Skorila, Varnora, Zexila, Draxora, Krivena, Zrassina, Skarnokila, Vexela, Zorika, Draskora, Kresora, Zravenila, Vexarnoka, Skrixora, Drezila, Zexorna, Varnixa, Krixela, Zrassorila

random.surnames: Zrask, Skarn, Vex, Kriz, Drax, Zorn, Vask, Krix, Zex, Drask, Skrix, Varn, Zrak, Kresk, Drez, Vexor, Krask, Zriven, Skor, Varnex, Zexor, Draven, Krixor, Zraskor, Skarnex, Vexarn, Draxor, Zorak, Vaskor, Kriven, Zrass, Skarnok, Vexok, Drezor, Krixen, Zexin, Varnok, Skrax, Zraven, Daxor, Kresor, Zrikor, Vexarnok, Skorax, Drezik, Zrasken, Krixar, Vornex, Zexar, Skarnix, Draxil, Kraskor, Zrivenok, Vexoril, Skarnel, Zorik, Vasken, Drezok, Krixel, Zraskil, Skoril, Varnor, Zexil, Draxoril, Krivenok, Zraskin, Skarnokil, Vexel, Zoril, Draskor, Kresil, Zravenil, Vexarnil, Skrixor, Drezil, Zexorn, Varnil, Krixoril, Zraskoril, Skarnor, Vexorok, Draxok, Zorok, Vaskok, Krizok, Zraskok, Skarnokor, Vexarnokor, Drezokor, Zexokor, Varnokor, Krixokor, Zravenokor, Skarnelok, Vexelok, Draxelok, Zorel, Vaskel, Krizel, Zraskel, Skarnel, Vexarnel, Drezel, Zexel, Varnel, Krixel, Zravenel, Skarnorel, Vexorel, Draxorel

description.en: The etyri are winged avian humanoids from Grail whose culture values omens, prophecy, ritual grooming, and the afterlife beyond the sky. Long associated with Zebulon’s lore and with graceful speech, courtliness, and flight, they are one of the few alien species more likely to inspire wonder than disgust among humans. Their society contains many breeds and lineages, from hawk-like noble Huar’raughq to artistically gifted Chirikiti, and offworld etyri often serve human houses, the Church, or the Merchant League while preserving an intensely future-oriented worldview.
description.es: Los etyri son humanoides aviares alados de Grail cuya cultura valora los presagios, la profecía, el acicalamiento ritual y la vida de ultracielo. Asociados desde antiguo al lore de Zebulón y al habla refinada, la cortesía y el vuelo, son una de las pocas especies alienígenas que despiertan más asombro que repulsión entre los humanos. Su sociedad contiene muchas razas y linajes, desde los nobles Huar’raughq con aspecto de rapaz hasta los Chirikiti dotados para las artes, y los etyri que viven fuera de su mundo suelen servir a casas humanas, a la Iglesia o a la Liga Mercantil sin perder su visión profundamente orientada al futuro.

names.male: Aelion, Vaelorin, Sereth, Thalien, Orien, Kaelith, Merion, Saelvar, Orenath, Vaelis, Thariel, Lorien, Maelion, Serathil, Vaelorn, Elionis, Orimar, Saelion, Thalior, Kaelor, Merathis, Orelian, Vaelithor, Serionel, Tharion, Aeloris, Maelorin, Saelith, Orenil, Vaelior, Serathor, Thalioren, Kaelion, Merionel, Orathiel, Saelorin, Vaelaran, Tharielon, Lorathis, Maelior, Seralith, Orenathor, Vaelionis, Thaleren, Kaeloran, Merielon, Orathion, Saeloran, Vaelithan, Tharionel, Aethorin, Vaeluun, Serethon, Thalienor, Oriael, Kaeluun, Merethil, Saeluun, Orenion, Vaelathen, Tharionel, Loruun, Maelathor, Serioneth, Vaeliorun, Elathion, Orieneth, Saelathor, Thaliorun, Kaelathen, Meruun, Orelith, Vaeluunor, Serethil, Tharuun, Aelathor, Maeluun, Saeliorun, Orenuun, Vaeliorun, Serathuun, Thalethor, Kaeluunor, Merathuun, Orathuun, Saeluunor, Vaelathuun, Tharathuun, Lorathuun, Maelathuun, Sereluun, Orenathuun, Vaelionuun, Thalioruun, Kaelioruun, Merionuun, Orienuun, Saelionuun, Vaelionor, Tharionuun, Aelionuun, Vaeluuneth, Seruuneth, Thalethuun, Orienethuun, Kaeluuneth, Meruuneth, Saeluuneth, Orenuuneth, Vaeluunor, Tharuuneth, Loruuneth, Maeluuneth, Serionuun, Orenionuun, Vaelioneth, Thalioneth, Kaelioneth, Merioneth, Orieneth, Saelioneth, Vaelionor, Tharionor, Aelionor, Vaelioren, Serioren, Thalioren, Orienor, Kaelioren, Merioren, Saelioren, Vaelioruneth, Thariorun, Loriorun, Maeliorun

description.en: The gannok are simian technophiles whose sudden mastery of language and machinery shocked human xenologists during the Second Republic. Small, flexible, intensely adaptive, and often underestimated, they became valued engineers, scribes, pilots, and tech-specialists across the jumpweb. Their species combines practical brilliance with bodily oddities such as prehensile tails, omnivorous resilience, and a powerful regenerative metabolism that leaves them perpetually hungry and socially stigmatized by their pungent smell.
description.es: Los gannok son tecnófilos simiescos cuyo repentino dominio del lenguaje y de la maquinaria sorprendió a los xenólogos humanos durante la Segunda República. Pequeños, flexibles, sumamente adaptables y a menudo subestimados, se convirtieron en ingenieros, escribas, pilotos y especialistas técnicos valiosos en toda la red de salto. Su especie combina brillantez práctica con rarezas corporales como colas prensiles, resistencia omnívora y un potente metabolismo regenerativo que los deja perpetuamente hambrientos y socialmente estigmatizados por su olor penetrante.

names.male: Gorak, Thurgan, Korg, Bratak, Drogun, Kharok, Vorg, Grunak, Torvak, Durgan, Krag, Morgun, Tark, Zorak, Brugan, Kordak, Thrak, Gurnok, Vargan, Drakor, Kharug, Morgak, Torug, Grakar, Durnok, Vrok, Kargan, Throg, Brakor, Gurnak, Zorg, Dargun, Krug, Tharak, Borgun, Vrokar, Gharok, Kurnak, Dragan, Torgak, Morgar, Kharan, Bragok, Drogak, Varnok, Gurnag, Thokar, Kragan, Drok, Kharog, Turgan, Morgunok, Kargok, Bragan, Thurgok, Vrokun, Gharun, Kragor, Dargok, Zorgun, Khorak, Murgan, Targok, Brakorun, Drogor, Vargok, Gurnokar, Thrakun, Krugor, Durnag, Zorun, Kargor, Thurgar, Morgok, Bragor, Vrokag, Gharag, Kurnog, Drakok, Torgun, Morgunor, Kharokun, Bragokar, Drogunor, Varnag, Gurnor, Thokun, Kraganor, Drokun, Zorgar, Khorun, Murgok, Targun, Brakor, Drogar, Vargun, Gurnakok, Thrakor, Krugun, Durnokar, Zorag, Kargun, Thurgokar, Morgarok, Bragokun, Vrokor, Gharokar, Kurnag, Drakorun, Torgar, Morgunag, Kharun, Bragorun, Drogok, Varnokar, Gurnagok, Thokor, Kraganok, Drokor, Zorgok, Khorag, Murgar, Targor, Brakorag, Drogunag, Vargor, Gurnokun, Thrakag, Krugokar, Durnor

description.en: The hironem are caste-bound reptilian aliens whose society revolves around the God-King, divine secrets, and the perception of s’su, the emotional and spiritual residue left by sentient beings and places. Those who leave Cadiz or Iver become outcasts by definition, yet many of them embrace that exile to explore the wider jumpweb, join the Muster, or pursue mysticism among the Eskatonics. They are poised, courteous, curious, and deeply shaped by a worldview in which status, ritual, and unseen resonance all matter.
description.es: Los hironem son alienígenas reptilianos sometidos a castas cuya sociedad gira en torno al Rey-Dios, secretos sagrados y la percepción del s’su, el residuo emocional y espiritual que dejan los seres y lugares conscientes. Quienes abandonan Cadiz o Iver se convierten por definición en parias, pero muchos abrazan ese exilio para explorar la red de salto, unirse a la Asamblea o seguir vías místicas entre los eskatónicos. Son seres comedidos, corteses, curiosos y profundamente moldeados por una cosmovisión en la que importan el rango, el ritual y las resonancias invisibles.

names.male: Ssaeth, Zhyris, Xelith, Thraez, Ssorin, Veyss, Zhaelor, Xyren, Threx, Ssarith, Zyrix, Xelzor, Thraxis, Ssavel, Veyrith, Zhaex, Xyssor, Thraen, Ssarik, Zhyran, Xelithor, Thraelor, Ssorinex, Veyssor, Zhaelin, Xyrris, Thraxisor, Ssavelin, Zhyrith, Xelraen, Thraexor, Ssorinith, Veyssin, Zhaerith, Xyssorin, Thraelis, Ssarikor, Zhyriss, Xelithen, Thraezor, Ssavelor, Veyriss, Zhaexor, Xyrenith, Thraxisen, Ssorinel, Zhyrinor, Xelzorin, Thraelin, Ssariketh, Veyssor, Zhaelorin, Xyrrith, Thraezin, Ssavelith, Zhyranor, Xelithor, Thraxiseth, Ssorinor, Veyrithor, Zhaelinor, Xyssorel, Thraenor, Ssarikor, Zhyrissor, Xelraenor, Thraexin, Ssorineth, Veyssor, Zhaerithor, Xyssorinor, Thraelor, Ssarikethor, Zhyrineth, Xelzoror, Thraelinor, Ssavelor, Veyrissor, Zhaexin, Xyrenor, Thraxisor, Ssorinor, Zhyrissin, Xelithor, Thraezor, Ssavelin, Veyrithor, Zhaelin, Xyssorin, Thraelin, Ssarikor, Zhyranor, Xelzorin, Thraexor, Ssorineth, Veyssin, Zhaerith, Xyrenith, Thraxisen, Ssavelor, Zhyrinor, Xelithen, Thraezin, Ssariketh, Veyssor, Zhaelorin, Xyrrith, Thraelinor, Ssorinor, Zhyrissor, Xelraenor, Thraexin, Ssorinethor, Veyrissor, Zhaexor, Xyssorinor, Thraelor, Ssarikethor

description.en: The hironem are caste-bound reptilian aliens whose society revolves around the God-King, divine secrets, and the perception of s’su, the emotional and spiritual residue left by sentient beings and places. Those who leave Cadiz or Iver become outcasts by definition, yet many of them embrace that exile to explore the wider jumpweb, join the Muster, or pursue mysticism among the Eskatonics. They are poised, courteous, curious, and deeply shaped by a worldview in which status, ritual, and unseen resonance all matter.
description.es: Los hironem son alienígenas reptilianos sometidos a castas cuya sociedad gira en torno al Rey-Dios, secretos sagrados y la percepción del s’su, el residuo emocional y espiritual que dejan los seres y lugares conscientes. Quienes abandonan Cadiz o Iver se convierten por definición en parias, pero muchos abrazan ese exilio para explorar la red de salto, unirse a la Asamblea o seguir vías místicas entre los eskatónicos. Son seres comedidos, corteses, curiosos y profundamente moldeados por una cosmovisión en la que importan el rango, el ritual y las resonancias invisibles.

names.male: Ssaeth, Zhyris, Xelith, Thraez, Ssorin, Veyss, Zhaelor, Xyren, Threx, Ssarith, Zyrix, Xelzor, Thraxis, Ssavel, Veyrith, Zhaex, Xyssor, Thraen, Ssarik, Zhyran, Xelithor, Thraelor, Ssorinex, Veyssor, Zhaelin, Xyrris, Thraxisor, Ssavelin, Zhyrith, Xelraen, Thraexor, Ssorinith, Veyssin, Zhaerith, Xyssorin, Thraelis, Ssarikor, Zhyriss, Xelithen, Thraezor, Ssavelor, Veyriss, Zhaexor, Xyrenith, Thraxisen, Ssorinel, Zhyrinor, Xelzorin, Thraelin, Ssariketh, Veyssor, Zhaelorin, Xyrrith, Thraezin, Ssavelith, Zhyranor, Xelithor, Thraxiseth, Ssorinor, Veyrithor, Zhaelinor, Xyssorel, Thraenor, Ssarikor, Zhyrissor, Xelraenor, Thraexin, Ssorineth, Veyssor, Zhaerithor, Xyssorinor, Thraelor, Ssarikethor, Zhyrineth, Xelzoror, Thraelinor, Ssavelor, Veyrissor, Zhaexin, Xyrenor, Thraxisor, Ssorinor, Zhyrissin, Xelithor, Thraezor, Ssavelin, Veyrithor, Zhaelin, Xyssorin, Thraelin, Ssarikor, Zhyranor, Xelzorin, Thraexor, Ssorineth, Veyssin, Zhaerith, Xyrenith, Thraxisen, Ssavelor, Zhyrinor, Xelithen, Thraezin, Ssariketh, Veyssor, Zhaelorin, Xyrrith, Thraelinor, Ssorinor, Zhyrissor, Xelraenor, Thraexin, Ssorinethor, Veyrissor, Zhaexor, Xyssorinor, Thraelor, Ssarikethor
names.female: Thraexa, Ssorina, Veyssia, Zhaerita, Xyssora, Thraela, Ssarika, Zhyrissa, Xelitha, Thraeza, Ssavela, Veyrissa, Zhaexa, Xyrenia, Thraxia, Ssorina, Zhyrina, Xelzoria, Thraela, Ssarika, Veyssa, Zhaelia, Xyrria, Thraeza, Ssavelia, Zhyrana, Xelitha, Thraxia, Ssorina, Veyrira, Zhaelia, Xyssora, Thraena, Ssarika, Zhyrissa, Xelraea, Thraexa, Ssorina, Veyssa, Zhaerita, Xyssora, Thraela, Ssarika, Zhyrina, Xelzora, Thraela, Ssavelia, Veyrissa, Zhaexa, Xyrenia, Thraxia, Ssorina, Zhyrissa, Xelitha, Thraeza, Ssavelia, Veyrira, Zhaelia, Xyssora, Thraela, Ssarika, Zhyrana, Xelzoria, Thraexa, Ssorina, Veyssia, Zhaerita, Xyrenia, Thraxia, Ssavelia, Zhyrina, Xelitha, Thraeza, Ssarika, Veyssa, Zhaelia, Xyrria, Thraela, Ssorina, Zhyrissa, Xelraea, Thraexa, Ssorina, Veyrissa, Zhaexa, Xyssora, Thraela, Ssarika

random.surnames: Ssaeth, Zhyriss, Xelith, Thraez, Ssorin, Veyss, Zhaelor, Xyren, Threx, Ssarith, Zyrix, Xelzor, Thraxis, Ssavel, Veyrith, Zhaex, Xyssor, Thraen, Ssarik, Zhyran, Xelithor, Thraelor, Ssorinex, Veyssor, Zhaelin, Xyrris, Thraxisor, Ssavelin, Zhyrith, Xelraen, Thraexor, Ssorinith, Veyssin, Zhaerith, Xyssorin, Thraelis, Ssarikor, Zhyriss, Xelithen, Thraezor, Ssavelor, Veyriss, Zhaexor, Xyrenith, Thraxisen, Ssorinel, Zhyrinor, Xelzorin, Thraelin, Ssariketh, Veyssor, Zhaelorin, Xyrrith, Thraezin, Ssavelith, Zhyranor, Xelithor, Thraxiseth, Ssorinor, Veyrithor, Zhaelinor, Xyssorel, Thraenor, Ssarikor, Zhyrissor, Xelraenor, Thraexin, Ssorineth, Veyssor, Zhaerithor, Xyssorinor, Thraelor, Ssarikethor, Zhyrineth, Xelzoror, Thraelinor, Ssavelor, Veyrissor, Zhaexin, Xyrenor, Thraxisor, Ssorinor, Zhyrissin, Xelithor, Thraezor, Ssavelin, Veyrithor, Zhaelin, Xyssorin, Thraelin, Ssarikor, Zhyranor, Xelzorin, Thraexor, Ssorineth, Veyssin, Zhaerith, Xyrenith, Thraxisen, Ssavelor, Zhyrinor, Xelithen, Thraezin, Ssariketh, Veyssor, Zhaelorin, Xyrrith, Thraelinor, Ssorinor, Zhyrissor, Xelraenor, Thraexin, Ssorinethor, Veyrissor, Zhaexor, Xyssorinor, Thraelor, Ssarikethor

description.en: The hironem are caste-bound reptilian aliens whose society revolves around the God-King, divine secrets, and the perception of s’su, the emotional and spiritual residue left by sentient beings and places. Those who leave Cadiz or Iver become outcasts by definition, yet many of them embrace that exile to explore the wider jumpweb, join the Muster, or pursue mysticism among the Eskatonics. They are poised, courteous, curious, and deeply shaped by a worldview in which status, ritual, and unseen resonance all matter.
description.es: Los hironem son alienígenas reptilianos sometidos a castas cuya sociedad gira en torno al Rey-Dios, secretos sagrados y la percepción del s’su, el residuo emocional y espiritual que dejan los seres y lugares conscientes. Quienes abandonan Cadiz o Iver se convierten por definición en parias, pero muchos abrazan ese exilio para explorar la red de salto, unirse a la Asamblea o seguir vías místicas entre los eskatónicos. Son seres comedidos, corteses, curiosos y profundamente moldeados por una cosmovisión en la que importan el rango, el ritual y las resonancias invisibles.

names.male: Ssaeth, Zhyris, Xelith, Thraez, Ssorin, Veyss, Zhaelor, Xyren, Threx, Ssarith, Zyrix, Xelzor, Thraxis, Ssavel, Veyrith, Zhaex, Xyssor, Thraen, Ssarik, Zhyran, Xelithor, Thraelor, Ssorinex, Veyssor, Zhaelin, Xyrris, Thraxisor, Ssavelin, Zhyrith, Xelraen, Thraexor, Ssorinith, Veyssin, Zhaerith, Xyssorin, Thraelis, Ssarikor, Zhyriss, Xelithen, Thraezor, Ssavelor, Veyriss, Zhaexor, Xyrenith, Thraxisen, Ssorinel, Zhyrinor, Xelzorin, Thraelin, Ssariketh, Veyssor, Zhaelorin, Xyrrith, Thraezin, Ssavelith, Zhyranor, Xelithor, Thraxiseth, Ssorinor, Veyrithor, Zhaelinor, Xyssorel, Thraenor, Ssarikor, Zhyrissor, Xelraenor, Thraexin, Ssorineth, Veyssor, Zhaerithor, Xyssorinor, Thraelor, Ssarikethor, Zhyrineth, Xelzoror, Thraelinor, Ssavelor, Veyrissor, Zhaexin, Xyrenor, Thraxisor, Ssorinor, Zhyrissin, Xelithor, Thraezor, Ssavelin, Veyrithor, Zhaelin, Xyssorin, Thraelin, Ssarikor, Zhyranor, Xelzorin, Thraexor, Ssorineth, Veyssin, Zhaerith, Xyrenith, Thraxisen, Ssavelor, Zhyrinor, Xelithen, Thraezin, Ssariketh, Veyssor, Zhaelorin, Xyrrith, Thraelinor, Ssorinor, Zhyrissor, Xelraenor, Thraexin, Ssorinethor, Veyrissor, Zhaexor, Xyssorinor, Thraelor, Ssarikethor

random.surnames: Ssaeth, Zhyriss, Xelith, Thraez, Ssorin, Veyss, Zhaelor, Xyren, Threx, Ssarith, Zyrix, Xelzor, Thraxis, Ssavel, Veyrith, Zhaex, Xyssor, Thraen, Ssarik, Zhyran, Xelithor, Thraelor, Ssorinex, Veyssor, Zhaelin, Xyrris, Thraxisor, Ssavelin, Zhyrith, Xelraen, Thraexor, Ssorinith, Veyssin, Zhaerith, Xyssorin, Thraelis, Ssarikor, Zhyriss, Xelithen, Thraezor, Ssavelor, Veyriss, Zhaexor, Xyrenith, Thraxisen, Ssorinel, Zhyrinor, Xelzorin, Thraelin, Ssariketh, Veyssor, Zhaelorin, Xyrrith, Thraezin, Ssavelith, Zhyranor, Xelithor, Thraxiseth, Ssorinor, Veyrithor, Zhaelinor, Xyssorel, Thraenor, Ssarikor, Zhyrissor, Xelraenor, Thraexin, Ssorineth, Veyssor, Zhaerithor, Xyssorinor, Thraelor, Ssarikethor, Zhyrineth, Xelzoror, Thraelinor, Ssavelor, Veyrissor, Zhaexin, Xyrenor, Thraxisor, Ssorinor, Zhyrissin, Xelithor, Thraezor, Ssavelin, Veyrithor, Zhaelin, Xyssorin, Thraelin, Ssarikor, Zhyranor, Xelzorin, Thraexor, Ssorineth, Veyssin, Zhaerith, Xyrenith, Thraxisen, Ssavelor, Zhyrinor, Xelithen, Thraezin, Ssariketh, Veyssor, Zhaelorin, Xyrrith, Thraelinor, Ssorinor, Zhyrissor, Xelraenor, Thraexin, Ssorinethor, Veyrissor, Zhaexor, Xyssorinor, Thraelor, Ssarikethor

description.en: The ishkin are stealthy marsupial weasels from Wolf’s Lament, famous for sly intelligence, curiosity, and fur that functions like living fiber-optic camouflage. Once hidden from humans, they now live both in the wilderness and on the fringes of Vuldrok settlements, where they are admired, distrusted, exploited, or hunted for their pelts. Ishkin culture celebrates cunning and survival, and their people excel at stealth, opportunism, improvisation, and movement between the civilized and the wild.
description.es: Los ishkin son comadrejas marsupiales sigilosas de Wolf’s Lament, famosas por su inteligencia astuta, curiosidad y un pelaje que funciona como camuflaje vivo de fibra óptica. Antaño ocultos a los humanos, ahora viven tanto en la naturaleza salvaje como en los márgenes de los asentamientos vuldrok, donde son admirados, desconfiados, explotados o cazados por sus pieles. La cultura ishkin celebra la astucia y la supervivencia, y su gente destaca en el sigilo, el oportunismo, la improvisación y el movimiento entre lo civilizado y lo salvaje.

names.male: Sesh, Viri, Keshin, Zarik, Lir, Vesh, Kiren, Sazik, Tiril, Veskan, Rish, Kiri, Ziven, Lask, Sirek, Varn, Keshar, Zirin, Lirak, Seshik, Virin, Kirel, Zash, Liren, Sivar, Kesh, Zarik, Liss, Tiren, Vesir, Rin, Keshil, Zivenar, Laskin, Sirel, Varek, Kirin, Zashir, Lirin, Seshar, Virinel, Kirek, Zavin, Laskar, Sirek, Veshin, Kiran, Ziril, Lissar, Seshin, Virek, Keshir, Ziven, Lir, Sivarik, Keshan, Zarik, Lissen, Tiril, Veskar, Rishen, Kiri, Zivenor, Lask, Sirel, Varnis, Keshik, Zirin, Lirak, Seshor, Virin, Kirel, Zashik, Liren, Sivar, Kesh, Zarik, Lissik, Tiren, Vesir, Rinik, Keshil, Zivenar, Laskin, Sirel, Varek, Kirin, Zashir, Lirin, Seshar, Virinel, Kirek, Zavin, Laskar, Sirek, Veshin, Kiran, Ziril, Lissar, Seshin, Virel, Keshir, Ziven, Lir, Sivarik, Keshan, Zarik, Lissen, Tiril, Veskar, Rishen, Kiri, Zivenor, Lask, Sirel, Varnis, Keshik, Zirin, Lirak, Seshor, Virin, Kirel, Zashik, Liren, Sivar, Kesh, Zarik, Lissik, Tiren, Vesir, Rinik, Keshil, Zivenar, Laskin, Sirel, Varek, Kirin, Zashir, Lirin, Seshar

random.surnames: Silkstep, Nightwhisk, Glimmerfur, Shadeleaf, Quickshadow, Mossrun, Flickerhide, Softclaw, Duskrun, Brightwhisk, Ashglide, Silenttail, Whisperfur, Shardstep, Nightgleam, Swiftshade, Glowmoss, Thinshadow, Quickgleam, Mistfur, Flickertail, Darkwhisk, Softshadow, Glintfur, Shadefur, Quickleaf, Mosswhisk, Duskgait, Brighttail, Ashwhisk, Silentstep, Whisperhide, Shardtail, Nightfur, Swiftwhisk, Glowtail, Thinfur, Quickshade, Mistwhisk, Flickerstep, Darktail, Softfur, Glinttail, Shadewhisk, Quickfur, Mossstep, Duskwhisk, Brightfur, Ashstep, Silentfur, Whisperstep, Shardfur, Nighttail, Swiftfur, Glowwhisk, Thinwhisk, Quicktail, Miststep, Flickerfur, Darkstep, Softtail, Glintstep, Shadegait, Quickgait, Mossfur, Dusktail, Brightgait, Ashgait, Silentgait, Whispergait, Shardgait, Nightgait, Swiftgait, Glowgait, Thingait, Quickrun, Mistrun, Flickerrun, Darkrun, Softrun, Glintrun, Shaderun, Mossrunner, Duskrunner, Brightrunner, Ashrunner, Silentrunner, Whisperrunner, Shardrunner, Nightrunner, Swiftrunner, Glowrunner, Thinrunner, Quickrunner, Mistrunner, Flickerrunner, Darkrunner, Softrunner, Glintrunner, Shaderunner, Mossgait, Duskgait, Brightgait, Ashgait, Silentgait, Whispergait, Shardgait, Nightgait, Swiftgait, Glowgait, Thingait, Quickgait, Mistgait, Flickergait, Darkgait, Softgait, Glintgait, Shadegait

description.en: The oro'ym are ancient amphibious humanoids from Madoc whose confederated nations preserve genealogies stretching back hundreds of generations, a non-hierarchical animist worldview, and a long memory of both undersea civilization and interstellar contact. Proud, traditional, and intensely loyal once friendship is earned, they move between ocean depths, sacred lore, and offworld scavenging with equal seriousness. Their bodies are built for water, regeneration, and balance, but they depend on moisture and warmth in ways most land dwellers do not understand.
description.es: Los oro'ym son antiguos humanoides anfibios de Madoc cuyas naciones confederadas preservan genealogías que se remontan cientos de generaciones, una cosmovisión animista no jerárquica y una larga memoria tanto de civilización submarina como de contacto interestelar. Orgullosos, tradicionales e intensamente leales una vez ganada su amistad, se mueven entre las profundidades oceánicas, el lore sagrado y el salvamento fuera del mundo con igual seriedad. Sus cuerpos están hechos para el agua, la regeneración y el equilibrio, pero dependen de la humedad y del calor de formas que la mayoría de los habitantes terrestres no comprenden.

description.en: The shantor are huge horselike quadrupeds from Shaprut whose history with humanity runs from divine awe to enslavement, revolt, reform, and a still unfinished struggle for freedom. Long exploited as labor and cavalry, they nonetheless possess remarkable bodily coordination, high-range hearing, and a culture of runners, family bands, and sun reverence. Modern shantor offworlders carry the memory of oppression with them, and many seek either service with dignity or lives dedicated to healing and liberation.
description.es: Los shantor son enormes cuadrúpedos con aspecto equino de Shaprut cuya historia con la humanidad va de la veneración divina a la esclavitud, la revuelta, la reforma y una lucha por la libertad aún inconclusa. Explotados durante mucho tiempo como mano de obra y caballería, poseen sin embargo una coordinación corporal notable, oído de frecuencias altas y una cultura de corredores, grupos familiares y reverencia solar. Los shantor modernos que viven fuera de su mundo cargan con la memoria de la opresión, y muchos buscan o bien un servicio con dignidad o bien vidas dedicadas a la curación y la liberación.

names.male: Gorun, Thamor, Brugan, Morath, Dorun, Gharum, Thoran, Borak, Munor, Garun, Thragor, Borun, Morun, Doran, Gathor, Thunor, Brathor, Gorath, Munak, Garath, Thoran, Borath, Morag, Dorath, Gharon, Thamor, Brugan, Gorun, Munor, Garun, Thragan, Borun, Morun, Doran, Gathor, Thunor, Brathor, Gorath, Munak, Garath, Thoran, Borath, Morag, Dorath, Gharon, Thamor, Brugan, Gorun, Munor, Garun, Gorath, Thamor, Brugan, Morath, Dorun, Gharum, Thoran, Borak, Munor, Garun, Thragor, Borun, Morun, Doran, Gathor, Thunor, Brathor, Gorath, Munak, Garath, Thoran, Borath, Morag, Dorath, Gharon, Thamor, Brugan, Gorun, Munor, Garun, Thragan, Borun, Morun, Doran, Gathor, Thunor, Brathor, Gorath, Munak, Garath, Thoran, Borath, Morag, Dorath, Gharon, Thamor, Brugan, Gorun, Munor, Garun, Gorath, Thamor, Brugan, Morath, Dorun, Gharum, Thoran, Borak, Munor, Garun, Thragor, Borun, Morun, Doran, Gathor, Thunor, Brathor, Gorath, Munak, Garath

random.surnames: Stonehorn, Deepgraze, Longstep, Broadback, Earthtread, Slowriver, Highplain, Duskherd, Gravelhorn, Redgraze, Ironhide, Longhorn, Deepfield, Widehoof, Dustwalker, Grasswarden, Stonegraze, Deepstep, Broadhoof, Longfield, Earthgraze, Slowhoof, Highgraze, Duskstep, Gravelback, Redhorn, Ironhorn, Longgraze, Deephoof, Widefield, Dustgraze, Grasswalker, Stonewalker, Deepback, Broadgraze, Longhoof, Earthwalker, Slowgraze, Highhoof, Duskhoof, Gravelstep, Redback, Irongraze, Longstep, Deepgraze, Widegraze, Dusthoof, Grassstep, Stonehoof, Deepwalker, Broadfield, Longgraze, Earthhoof, Slowstep, Highfield, Duskfield, Gravelgraze, Redstep, Irongraze, Longback, Deepback, Widehoof, Dustfield, Grassgraze, Stoneback, Deepfield, Broadstep, Longhoof, Earthstep, Slowfield, Highstep, Duskstep, Gravelhoof, Redhoof, Ironstep, Longfield, Deepgraze, Wideback, Duststep, Grassfield, Stonegraze, Deepstep, Broadhoof, Longfield, Earthgraze, Slowhoof, Highgraze, Duskstep, Gravelback, Redhorn, Ironhorn, Longgraze, Deephoof, Widefield, Dustgraze, Grasswalker, Stonewalker, Deepback, Broadgraze, Longhoof, Earthwalker, Slowgraze, Highhoof, Duskhoof
